title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Endometriosis
description: Paeonia lactiflora tinctures contains paeoniflorin and paeonol, two active compounds with anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce inflammation and pain associated with endometriosis. Paeonol also has a relaxing effect on the uterine muscles, which can ease menstrual cramps and other symptoms.
